name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Direct income support of Rs. 6000 per year to small and marginal farmer families who own cultivable land.
benefit: Rs. 6000 per year paid in 3 equal instalments of Rs. 2000 directly to bank account

name: PM Awas Yojana Gramin (Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Rural)
description: Financial assistance to rural households to build a pucca house with basic amenities.
benefit: Rs. 1.20 lakh (plains) or Rs. 1.30 lakh (hilly/difficult areas) for house construction

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY (Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana)
description: Health insurance providing free medical treatment up to Rs. 5 lakh per family per year at empanelled hospitals.
benefit: Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalisation

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana (Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana)
description: Free LPG gas connections to women from below poverty line (BPL) households to ensure clean cooking fuel.
benefit: Free LPG connection with first refill free; subsidised refills thereafter

name: PMFBY (Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana)
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss or damage due to unforeseen events.
benefit: Insurance coverage for Kharif crops at 2% premium, Rabi crops at 1.5% premium; full sum insured on total crop loss

name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) - Pre & Post Matric Scholarship
description: Scholarships for students from SC, ST, OBC, minority and economically weaker sections for school and higher education.
benefit: Pre-Matric: Rs. 1000-10,000/year; Post-Matric: Rs. 5000-20,000/year; Higher Education: up to Rs. 20,000/year

name: PM Mudra Yojana (Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana)
description: Collateral-free micro loans to small and micro enterprises for income-generating activities in non-farm sector.
benefit: Shishu: up to Rs. 50,000 | Kishore: Rs. 50,001 to Rs. 5 lakh | Tarun: Rs. 5 lakh to Rs. 10 lakh

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for the girl child providing high interest rate and tax benefits to secure her future.
benefit: Current interest rate 8.2% p.a. (one of highest for small savings); tax-free maturity amount; account matures at age 21

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Government-backed pension scheme for unorganised sector workers providing guaranteed pension after age 60.
benefit: Guaranteed pension of Rs. 1000-5000/month after age 60 depending on contribution; spouse continuation benefit

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Free skill training programme under Skill India Mission to enable youth to earn better livelihood.
benefit: Free certified skill training; Rs. 500-8000 stipend during training; job placement support; certificate recognised by industry
